engines.chiptune3Desc: Ndhukung 20+ format tracker (.xm/.mod/.it/.s3m/.mptm/.umx …). Mundur menyang FFmpeg kanggo format liyane.
engines.ffmpegDesc: Ngonversi kabeh format audio dadi MP3. Dhukungan paling jembar, wiwitan luwih alon.
engines.bassoonDesc: Mung ndhukung .xm / .mod. Mudhun bali menyang Chiptune3 banjur FFmpeg kanggo format liyane.

settings.title: Setelan
settings.engineDesc: Pilih mesin audio sing arep digunakake. Chiptune3 disaranake kanggo dhukungan format tracker sing paling apik.

player.webAudioUnsupported:
Nuwun sewu
Browser sampeyan ora ndhukung WebAudio.
Browser sing didhukung yaiku Chrome, Firefox, Safari, lan Edge

intro.title: Panduan
intro.tutorialStep5Body: Gawe akun gratis kanggo mbukak fitur tambahan:

tutorialMock.legendEmpty: --- / 00 / … = Kosong (ora ana cathetan / ora ana instrumen / ora ana efek)
tutorialMock.labelActions: Simpen berkas · Sumber ModArchive · Metadata trek
tutorialMock.annotScopes: Gelombang saben saluran — saben baris nuduhake gelombang wektu nyata saka siji saluran audio
tutorialMock.annotModeSwitch: Tombol mode biasane mung nuduhake lambang — ngeklik ngubengi papat mode pamuteran
tutorialMock.labelFormatFilter: Klik "Format" kanggo mbukak panel multi-pilih · Filter gulung mudhun Channel/Size · Urut multi-lapangan
tutorialMock.labelFilter: Dropdown sumber: Kabeh / Favorit / Riwayat  |  Kothak telusur: telusuri miturut jeneng berkas utawa judhul
tutorialMock.annotPlaylist: Klik baris apa wae kanggo miwiti puter maneh · Saben baris nuduhake: nomer · irah-irahan · format · saluran · ukuran · jeneng berkas
tutorialMock.annotAccount: Registrasi gratis · Mung favorit lan riwayat sing disimpen · Ora ana pelacakan, ora ana iklan

intro.tutorialStep3Body: Tracker Player ndadekake musik urip kanthi rong visualisasi wektu nyata sing saling nglengkapi:
intro.introWelcome: Gerbang sampeyan kanggo nikmati musik tracker ing 68+ format — saka MOD lan XM sing legendaris nganti MPTM lan UMX modern — njupuk saka koleksi jembar ing
intro.tutorialStep4Body: Tracker Player bisa diatur kanthi gampang. Bukak setelan liwat lambang gear (bar ndhuwur) utawa kuping Setelan (sidebar kiwa):
intro.tutorialLead: Pandhuan iki nuntun sampeyan liwat saben fitur Tracker Player, saka nemokake trek pisanan nganti ngatur pamuter kanggo alur kerja sampeyan.
intro.tutorialStep2Body: Klik sembarang trek ing dhaptar lagu kanggo miwiti puter maneh. Pamuter langsung mbukak — umume file wiwit diputer ing sangisore sedetik. Nalika trek lagi diputer, sampeyan bakal weruh:
intro.tutorialStep1Body: Dhaptar lagu minangka jantung Tracker Player. Gunakake bar panelusuran ing ndhuwur kanggo nemokake trek miturut jeneng berkas utawa judhul. Ing ngisor bar panelusuran, sampeyan bakal nemokake sakumpulan saringan sing kuat:
intro.tutorialStep6Tip: Tip pro: Ing ponsel, tambahake Tracker Player menyang layar ngarep kanggo pengalaman kaya aplikasi asli. Iki bisa digunakake kanthi apik minangka Aplikasi Web Progresif kanthi caching offline.
intro.introTrackerBody3: Nganti saiki, musik tracker isih ngrembaka ing komunitas demoscene global lan ing antarane para penggemar komputasi retro. Tracker Player ngarep-arep bisa ngenalake luwih akeh wong marang wujud seni unik iki sing nggawa sejarah musik komputer, liwat antarmuka modern lan interaksi sing gampang.
intro.introWhatBody1: Tracker Player minangka proyek pribadi open-source sing darmabakti kanggo nggawa pesona musik tracker menyang browser modern. Iki dudu mesin audio anyar, nanging integrasi jero lan pangembangan sekunder sing dibangun ing proyek open-source sing wis apik, nggawe sistem pengalaman pangguna sing lengkap.
intro.introWhatBody3: Saka panelusuran lan panyaring dhaptar lagu, visualisasi audio, sistem akun pangguna nganti dhukungan internasionalisasi, Tracker Player wis mbangun ekosistem lengkap fitur periferal ing saubengé inti pamuter, kanthi tujuan supaya pangguna bisa nikmati pesona unik musik tracker tanpa latar mburi teknis.
intro.introWelcomeNote: Tracker Player luwih saka mung pamuter — iku platform musik tracker kanthi fitur lengkap, antarmuka sing apik lan responsif, visualisasi pola wektu nyata, osiloskop saben saluran, lan piranti-piranti sing dirancang kanggo nggawe nemokake lan nikmati musik tracker kanthi gampang ing piranti apa wae.
intro.introTrackerBody1: Musik tracker (uga dikenal minangka musik modul utawa musik MOD) minangka wujud musik digital unik sing muncul ing pungkasan taun 1980-an ing Commodore Amiga. Beda karo MP3 utawa audio streaming, file tracker ngemot skor musik (cathetan, pola, efek) lan sampel instrumen — kaya file proyek musik sing mandhiri. Iki ndadekake file tracker kompak banget nalika ngidini kerumitan musik sing luar biasa.
intro.introWhatBody2Tail: , browser basis Amiga MOD/XM tracker sing ditulis nganggo JavaScript murni dening Steffest, kanthi setya nggawe maneh pengalaman puter maneh tracker klasik. Mbangun ing dhasar iki, proyek kasebut alon-alon nggabungake Chiptune3 (mesin WebAssembly khusus adhedhasar libopenmpt) lan transkoding server-side FFmpeg, nggedhekake dhukungan format saka MOD/XM asli dadi luwih saka 68 format.
intro.tutorialStep6Body: Saben trek ing Tracker Player nduweni URL permanen sing bisa dienggo bareng. Salin link saka bar alamat browser nalika trek lagi diputer — bakal katon kaya /song/123456/filename.mod. Kirim menyang kanca, pasang ing media sosial, utawa tandhani kanggo mengko. Link kasebut bakal tansah mbukak trek sing padha.
intro.changelogIntro: Tracker Player wis ngalami évolusi sing signifikan saka asal-usulé minangka pamuter MOD/XM sing prasaja. Iki wektu garis saka tonggak-tonggak utama:
intro.creditsVueDesc: Kerangka kerja JavaScript progresif sing digunakake kanggo UI basis komponen kita. API Komposisi Vue, sistem reaktivitas, lan komponen file tunggal ndadekake bisa mbangun lan njaga antarmuka pamuter sing kompleks kanthi kode sing resik lan modular.
intro.creditsNuxtDesc: Vue.js meta-framework sing nguwasani kabeh frontend lan backend kita. Nuxt nyedhiyakake rendering sisih server kanggo kaca sing cepet dimuat lan SEO, server Nitro kanggo rute API, integrasi database SQLite, lan pamisahan kode otomatis kanggo kinerja optimal.
intro.creditsTailwindDesc: Kerangka kerja CSS sing ngutamakake utilitas digunakake kanggo gaya. Sistem token desain Tailwind ndadekake arsitektur 16-tema kita — saben werna, bayangan, lan wates adaptasi karo tema aktif liwat properti khusus CSS sing digawe saka konfigurasi Tailwind kita.
intro.creditsIntro: Tracker Player dibangun ing pundhak ekosistem open-source sing luar biasa. Kabeh perpustakaan trek 135.400+ kita asale saka The Mod Archive — repositori definitif internet kanggo musik tracker. Kita matur nuwun banget marang saben kontributor sing karyane ndadekake proyek iki bisa ditindakake.
intro.creditsEmscriptenDesc: Ranté alat kompiler basis LLVM sing ngompilasi kode C/C++ dadi WebAssembly. Kita nggunakake Emscripten kanggo ngompilasi libopenmpt sing wis dipatch — kalebu waveform_processor khusus — dadi modul WASM file tunggal sing mlaku kanthi kacepetan meh asli ing AudioWorklet browser.
intro.creditsAudioWorkletDesc: Spesifikasi W3C Web Audio API sing ngidini pangolahan audio kanthi latensi cendhak lan tanpa gangguan ing thread wektu nyata khusus. AudioWorklet iku papan mesin Chiptune3 nglakokake libopenmpt WASM sing dikompilasi, ora gumantung saka thread UI utama, njamin pamuteran lancar sanajan ana aktivitas antarmuka.
intro.creditsWebGLDesc: API grafis browser sing nggawe tampilan pola tracker wektu nyata. Data cathetan pola dialirake menyang kanvas WebGL ing 60 fps, ngasilake tampilan cathetan gulir kaya editor tracker klasik kayata ProTracker lan FastTracker II.
intro.creditsBassoonDesc: Digawe dening Steffest. Implementasi ulang basis browser sing setya saka tracker MOD lan XM klasik Amiga — ProTracker lan FastTracker II — ditulis kabeh nganggo JavaScript. BassoonTracker nyedhiyakake pamuteran asli lan anget sing miwiti proyek iki, kanthi dhukungan lengkap kanggo MOD 4 saluran klasik lan XM multi-saluran kalebu envelopes, filter, lan efek.
intro.creditsModArchiveDesc: Repositori musik trek paling unggul ing internet, nyimpen luwih saka 150.000 modul saka ewonan seniman sajrone patang dasawarsa. The Mod Archive minangka sumber tunggal musik ing perpustakaan kita lan institusi sing ora bisa diganti kanggo komunitas tracking.
intro.introTrackerBody2: Format iki dipionirake dening Ultimate Soundtracker-é Karsten Obarski ing taun 1987, lan kanthi cepet ngrembaka liwat demoscene — sawijining subkultur sing rame ing ngendi para programer, musisi, lan seniman saingan kanggo nyipta karya audiovisual sing nggumunake. Sajrone pirang-pirang dasawarsa, puluhan format tracker muncul, saben-saben nyurung wates-wates apa sing bisa ditindakake: luwih akeh saluran, efek sing luwih apik, instrumen sing disintesis, dhukungan plugin VST, lan malah kemampuan mixing sing lengkap. Saiki, adegan tracker tetep aktif ing saindenging jagad, kanthi musik anyar sing dirilis saben dina ing situs kaya The Mod Archive.
intro.creditsChiptune3Desc: Digawe dening DrSnuggles — perpustakaan JavaScript open-source sing mbungkus libopenmpt ing AudioWorklet kanggo muter maneh format tracker 68+ ing browser. Kanggo proyek iki, kita nyetel prosesor AudioWorklet kanggo njupuk data gelombang saben saluran (nggerakake oscilloscope multi-saluran), nambah kontrol gain otomatis, lan nguatake penanganan race-condition kanggo ganti trek kanthi cepet. Chiptune3 dadi jembatan antarane Web Audio API browser lan daya dekoding saka libopenmpt sing wis ditambal, lan iki mesin sing disaranake minangka standar.
intro.creditsLibopenmptDesc: Dikembangake dening kontributor OpenMPT. Pustaka puter maneh tracker open-source sing definitif, ndhukung 68+ format modul kanthi akurasi sing ora ana tandhingane. Kita ngowahi kode sumber C libopenmpt — nambahake waveform_processor khusus sing njupuk data PCM saben saluran ing mixer sadurunge output pungkasan — lan dikompilasi dadi WebAssembly liwat Emscripten. Bangunan WASM sing wis ditambal ngganti binar pra-kompilasi saka ndhuwur sing dibundel karo Chiptune3, mbisakake oscilloscope saben saluran lan dadi tulang punggung dekoding kanggo kabeh 68+ format.
tutorialStep1Filters: Filter Format — Klik kanggo mbukak kothak multi-pilih saka kabeh format sing kasedhiya. Gunakake tombol prasetel kanggo milih grup kanthi cepet: Bassoon (MOD/XM), Major Tracker (MOD/XM/IT/S3M/MPTM), Chiptune3 Kabeh (56 format), utawa Kabeh sing Didhukung.
Filter Saluran — Nyaring miturut cacah saluran: 4 saluran (jaman MOD klasik), 8 saluran, utawa 8+ saluran (multitrek modern).
Filter Ukuran — Nyaring miturut ukuran file: cilik (<100KB), sedheng, utawa gedhe (>1MB).
Filter Jeneng Tracker — Ketik jeneng tracker (contone, "Impulse Tracker", "FastTracker") kanggo nemokake musik sing digawe nganggo piranti lunak tartamtu.
Pilihan Urut — Urutake dhaptar lagu miturut ID, irah-irahan, jeneng berkas, ukuran, utawa tanggal owah-owahan, kanthi urutan munggah utawa mudhun.
Pamilih Sumber — Ganti antarane Kabeh trek, Favorit sampeyan, lan Riwayat Puter sampeyan.
tutorialStep2Details: Info Trek — Judul, artis, format, cacah saluran, lan nomer trek ditampilake ing ndhuwur kontrol pamuter.
Puter/Pause & Navigasi — Tombol puter/pause gedhe kanthi pamilih mode puter maneh: Acak (random), Miturut Urutan (sequential), Muter Siji, utawa Mandheg Sawise Saiki.
Lagu Sabanjuré — Langsung menyang lagu sabanjuré kanthi manual, utawa supaya mode puteran sing dipilih sing ngatur.
Volume & Progress — Atur volume nganggo slider, goleki trek, lan deleng wektu sing wis diliwati/isih ana.
Tombol Seneng — Klik ati kanggo nambah trek menyang favorit (mbutuhake akun).
Undhuh — Simpen file tracker asli menyang piranti sampeyan.
Link ModArchive — Bukak kaca trek ing The Mod Archive kanggo konteks liyane lan komentar komunitas.
Modal Informasi Trek — Deleng metadata rinci: jeneng pelacak, tanggal, durasi, jinis wadhah, sublagu, cacah saluran, instrumen, sampel, pesenan, pola, lan pesen sing ditempelake saka komposer.
tutorialStep3Details: Tampilan Pola — Deleng data pola tracker sing nyata mlaku ing wektu nyata, digawe nganggo WebGL supaya kinerjane lancar banget. Saben kolom nggambarake saluran, saben baris minangka acara cathetan. Cathetan, instrumen, volume, lan printah efek kabeh ditampilake — kaya ing editor tracker klasik. Klik tombol pola kanggo ngalih antarane tata letak vertikal (tradisional) lan horisontal (layar amba).

Osiloskop Saben Saluran — Ing ngisor pamuter, sampeyan bakal weruh kothak tampilan gelombang — siji kanggo saben saluran audio ing trek. Iki didhukung dening prosesor gelombang tingkat C khusus kita sing dibangun ing libopenmpt, sing ngekstrak audio saluran individu sadurunge campuran pungkasan. Delengen gelombang saben saluran sing muter ing wektu nyata, menehi sidik jari visual babagan carane musik digawe — drum tendangan ing saluran 1, bass ing saluran 2, timbal ing saluran 3, lan sateruse.
Loro-lorone visualisasi bisa diuripake/matèni ing Setelan kanggo kinerja utawa pilihan.
tutorialStep4Settings: Mesin Pamuter — Pilih antarane BassoonTracker (MOD/XM klasik), Chiptune3 (disaranake, 20+ format), utawa FFmpeg (dhukungan format paling jembar liwat konversi server).

Tema — Pilih saka 16 tema warna. Tema padhang kalebu Padhang, Retro (Solarized), Samodra (Teal), Alas (Ijo), Stroberi (Jambon), Biru, Jambon, Cyan, Oranye, lan Abu-abu. Tema peteng kalebu Peteng, Tengah Wengi (Ungu Jero), Emas (Ireng & Emas), Ungu, Abang, lan Ijo.
Basa — 52 basa antarmuka. Pilihanmu disimpen sacara lokal.
Volume — Setel tingkat volume standar lan opsional meksa ing saben trek.
Normalisasi Swara — Nyetel volume puter maneh kanthi otomatis kanggo pangrungon sing konsisten (aktif kanthi gawan).
Cacah Loop Maksimal — Lagu Tracker kerep loop tanpa wates. Setel cacah loop maksimal kanggo nyegah puter maneh tanpa wates (standar: 1).
Tampilan Toggle — Tampilake utawa ndhelikake visualisasi ruang lingkup, tampilan pola, lan bagean pambuka.
tutorialStep5Details: Favorit — Ati-ati trek apa wae kanggo nyimpen ing dhaptar favorit, bisa diakses saka pamilih sumber dhaptar lagu.
Sajarah Puter — Saben trek sing diputer otomatis direkam. Telusuri sajarahmu kanggo nemokake trek maneh.
Sinkronisasi Lintas Piranti — Favorit lan riwayat sampeyan bakal nututi sampeyan ing antarane piranti nalika sampeyan mlebu.
Privasi — Akun sampeyan mung nyimpen favorit lan riwayat. Ora ana data pribadi sing diklumpukake utawa dituduhake.

items: Integrated libopenmpt as a third playback engine, supporting 68+ tracker formats with bit-accurate playback.
Developed custom waveform_processor in C — modifications to libopenmpt's source code enabling per-channel audio extraction before final mixing.
Compiled libopenmpt + waveform_processor to WebAssembly via Emscripten for in-browser execution.
Built WebGL-based pattern view with both vertical (traditional tracker) and horizontal (widescreen) display modes.
Added per-channel oscilloscope visualization — live scrolling waveforms for each audio channel, powered by the custom waveform processor.
Created adaptive font sizing and pixel-perfect text rendering in WebGL visualizer.
Implemented hard clipping protection to prevent uint8 texture overflow in waveform visualizers.
Added multi-channel signal normalization and noise gating for cleaner oscilloscope displays.
Fixed timing drift in Chiptune3 AudioWorklet for rock-solid playback synchronization.
Expanded format support to 56 formats in Chiptune3 + additional formats in libopenmpt.
Added user account system with registration, login, and favorites/history sync.
Added track info modal with comprehensive metadata display.
Added download modal — download original tracker files or convert to MP3.
Added horizontal layout mode for pattern display (transposed channel and row data).
Added theme-specific row highlight alpha variables for WebGL shader backgrounds.
Developed Chiptune3 — a custom WebAssembly audio engine supporting 20+ tracker formats with per-channel output.
Implemented AudioWorklet-based playback for low-latency, glitch-free audio.
Built dual-canvas oscilloscope system — spectrum analyzer (frequency domain) and waveform display (time domain).
Added WebGL rendering pipeline for high-performance visualizations.
Introduced 16 color themes with CSS custom properties and runtime switching.
Built the ear-bar sidebar (InfoDrawer) with 5 panels: Guide, Settings, Theme, Language, Account.
Added 52-language internationalization system with locale detection and fallback chains.
Implemented responsive mobile layout with safe-area support and collapsible navigation.
Added playlist search, format filter panel with preset buttons, and multi-field sort.
Built pagination controls with first/prev/-10/+10/next/last navigation.
Initial release as 'MOD Player' — a web-based player for MOD and XM tracker music.
Integrated BassoonTracker by Steffest as the core playback engine — browser-based Amiga tracker in JavaScript.
Built playlist interface with table view showing track number, title, and filename.
Added basic playback controls: play, pause, next, playback mode selection.
Created Settings panel with volume control, max loop setting, and display toggles.
Implemented local storage for user preferences (theme, language, settings).
Added introductory guide section explaining what tracker music is and how to use the player.
Sourced initial music library from CoolModFiles.com and The Mod Archive.
Designed the responsive layout foundation: header, player column, playlist column, footer.
Added dark and light theme support with CSS custom properties.

introFeatures: Perpustakaan 135.400+ file musik tracker sing nyakup 68+ format, saka MOD 4 saluran nganti epik 256 saluran.
Arsitèktur mesin telu: BassoonTracker (JS klasik), Chiptune3 (AudioWorklet + libopenmpt WASM), lan FFmpeg (transcoding sisih server) — dipilih kanthi otomatis kanggo saben file.
Tampilan pola pelacak wektu nyata sing digambar nganggo WebGL — deleng cathetan sing mlaku kaya ing editor pelacak klasik.
Osiloskop gelombang saben saluran — deleng output audio saben saluran minangka gelombang urip sing muter, didhukung dening ekstraksi gelombang tingkat C khusus.
Desain responsif sing adaptasi kanthi apik ing layar apa wae: desktop, tablet, utawa ponsel — kalebu mode pola horisontal kanggo layar amba.
16 tema warna sing digawe kanthi tliti — saka cahya sing resik nganti tengah wengi sing peteng, retro solarized, emas anget, lan kabeh ing antarane.
52 basa antarmuka — nggawe musik tracker bisa diakses dening pamireng ing saindenging jagad.
Panelusuran sing kuat, filter format multi-pilih kanthi tombol prasetel (Bassoon, Major Tracker, Chiptune3, Kabeh Didhukung), filter cacah saluran, lan urut multi-bidhang.
Sistem akun kanthi favorit lan riwayat puter — nyelarasake perpustakaan sampeyan ing kabeh piranti.
Pranala lagu sing bisa dienggo bareng permanen — saben trek entuk URL unik kaya /song/123456/filename.mod.
Undhuh file tracker asli utawa konversi menyang MP3 kanthi klik siji.
Panel informasi trek nuduhake metadata: judul, artis, pelacak, format, saluran, instrumen, sampel, pesenan, pola, lan pesen sing ditempelake.
Gratis, open-source, lan didorong dening komunitas — tanpa iklan, tanpa pelacakan, tanpa paywall.

trackInfo.title: Judhul
trackInfo.noMeta: Ora ana metadata sing kasedhiya kanggo trek iki.

cache.cleared: Dhaptar lagu sing disimpen wis dibusak!
